arts.ttl: Should it have stood? Dean gives verdict on Newcastle penalty
arts.sum: Mike Dean believes Ederson's contact on Newcastle's Anthony Gordon was 'minimal', but should the penalty have stood?

arts.ttl: Ederson pulls off a daring backheel under pressure during Man City's clash with Newcastle - and Pep Guardiola had the perfect reaction
arts.sum: In the first half of City's clash with Newcastle, Ederson received the ball outside of his own box as Anthony Gordon charged him down with the game level at 0-0.

arts.ttl: 'Come on': Pep Guardiola looks unimpressed after reporter asks him about Man City's 'siege mentality' as he gives a priceless reaction to the suggestion that the rest of the Premier League are 'against' his team
arts.sum: Ahead of this weekend's away match at Newcastle, Guardiola spoke to TNT Sports reporter Becky Ives. It was Ives' final question of the interview that drew the most interesting response.

arts.ttl: Guardiola wants close friend Arteta to explain himself after cryptic comments about Man City
arts.sum: “Next time he has to be more clear exactly what does he mean,” Guardiola said of Arteta. Asked about his relationship with Guardiola, Arteta said: “I love him, I respect him, I admire him and I admire his team and everything that he does.

arts.ttl: Trippier Wears Mismatch Adidas & Puma Boots in Premier League Match vs Manchester City
arts.sum: In the ongoing Premier League match between Newcastle United and Manchester City, Kieran Trippier was spotted wearing mismatched football boots.

arts.ttl: Barcelona open to selling midfielder Pep Guardiola has on Rodri replacement shortlist
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to enter the January transfer market in search of a replacement for Rodri. The Spanish midfielder has been ruled out for most of the season after injuring his ACL against Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium last weekend. In need of a replacement, Pep Guardiola, according to Madrid-Barcelona Portal, has identified Barca’s […] The post Barcelona open to selling midfielder Pep Guardiola has on Rodri replacement shortlist appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Newcastle host Man City in first PL game of the weekend
arts.sum: Josko Gvardiol had put Man City ahead in the first half with a stunning finish - follow for match updates

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola demands clarity from Mikel Arteta with promise of Arsenal 'war'
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has admitted he has been provoked into a "war" with Arsenal as he urged Gunners boss Mikel Arteta to explain his recent comments about his time at City. "He said he was here four years and knows exactly what happened here.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Man City team news: Lewis starts, no Isak

arts.ttl: Newcastle stars locked in feisty training ground inquest this week and some could be dropped
arts.sum: Newcastle were linked with Lille striker Jonathan David in the summer and the race is now for a clutch of teams to sign him on a free transfer. I’m a big believer in there’s no set team, everyone has to earn their place.
